gpu: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 with Max-Q Design
notes: Works perfectly with keyboard. If using the steam controller, the controller must be switched to a keyboard-only profile and must be turned on only after the game starts playing sounds at launch.
title: A Blind Legend
